ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota, Honda) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "odometer" REAL /* Odometer reading of the vehicle in miles */,
  "doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors on the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine type of the vehicle (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle (e.g., miles per gallon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES vehicle_colors ("color_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the vehicle */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale was made */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, finance, lease) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Purchase history of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the dealership location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the dealership location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the dealership location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the dealership location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the log entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, price adjustment) */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price of the vehicle after change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, manager, admin) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the user is assigned */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color variant */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the color (e.g., metallic, solid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespersons" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Full name of the salesperson */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)
